# Tables

| Feature  | Supported |
| -------- | --------- |
| Headings | yes       |
| Tables   | yes       |

Column alignment:

| Left | Center | Right |
| :--- | :----: | ----: |
| a    |   b    |     c |

Escaped pipes and inline formatting in cells:

| Cell with \| escaped pipe | `code` and **bold**         |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------- |
| still one row             | [link](https://nettrash.me) |

Not a table without its delimiter row:

| a | b |
| c | d |
